final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key bullet points listed and numbered on the side, and cartoon story scenes filling the main body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, depicted through cartoon narrative scenes
Scene/backdrop: must include a river battle setting evoking 赤壁
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, engaging children's-book atmosphere — exact mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title; must include key story bullet points as labeled annotations alongside the scenes
Constraints: must preserve child-appropriate storytelling clarity; title must be prominent; bullet points must be visually separated and clearly marked
Avoid: must avoid overly dark or violent imagery unsuitable for children
